name: western-caesar-salad
input: a chicken caesar salad with romaine lettuce, croutons, parmesan, and Caesar dressing
notes: USDA composite: 130g grilled chicken breast ~215 kcal, 100g romaine ~17 kcal, 25g croutons ~110 kcal, 15g parmesan ~60 kcal, 30ml Caesar dressing ~150 kcal. Advisory tier — dressing portion is the dominant variance.
